title: Over The Door Hooks - Heavy Duty Towel Rack with 5 Coat Hooks for Bedroom Kitchen, Gold Bathroom Decor
features: Durable and Rustproof: Made of laser-cut manganese steel, this gold back of the door hooks is designed to last. It's also rustproof and anti-corrosive, making it easy to care for with just a damp cloth

Easy to Install: No drilling is required. No drilling needed. Simply hang the coat hanger on the door or mount it on a wall. The cute design includes a sticker for added security when using the over the door hanger

Space-Saving Solution: With five hooks, this behind door towel rack is a space saver that can hold all your items without taking up too much room. It's perfect for your bathroom, bedroom, closet, kitchen, or garage

Multipurpose Use: This over the door rack is perfect for hanging coats, handbags, keys, hats, towels, belts, cooking ware, bags, and more. Its wide application makes it a versatile addition to any room in your home

Elegant and Practical: With a casual style that complements most home decor, this behind the door hook provides ample space for hanging items in your entryway, laundry room, bathroom, bedroom, closets, and kitchen
description: Two hanging methods: This door hook adopts a flexible hanging method, you can hang it directly on the door, the thickness of the door panel should be less than or equal to 1-3/4" or can be mounted directly to the wall using the included screw pack

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Heavy Duty, Lightweight, Non Slip, Rust Resistant
